data.description: Notice of 8.5% ownership in FD Technologies plc (FD), exceeding reporting threshold.

data.title: BiyaPay marks 6th year of innovation in global multi-asset trading, focusing on user experience and technology advancement.
data.description: BiyaPay, a globally renowned multi-asset trading wallet, is celebrating its sixth anniversary after being founded in 2019. Throughout its six-year journey, BiyaPay has remained committed to a user-focused approach, consistently introducing technological advancements and enhancing products to improve the User Experience.

data.title: IDEX Biometrics implemented a 100-to-1 share consolidation on 4 July 2025, following resolution at an extraordinary general meeting on 11 April 2025.
data.description: On April 11, 2025, an extraordinary general meeting resolved a 100-to-1 share consolidation (reverse split) in IDEX Biometrics ASA as previously announced.

SHIPMENTS OF PHONES WITHIN CHINA DOWN 21.8% Y/Y AT 23.72 MILLION HANDSETS IN MAY – CAICT

CAICT: DOMESTIC SMARTPHONE SHIPMENTS IN MAY TOTALED 23.72 MILLION UNITS, DOWN 21.8% Y/Y. SHIPMENTS OF FOREIGN BRANDED PHONES INCLUDING APPLE IPHONES WITHIN CHINA DOWN 9.7% Y/Y AT 4.54 MILLION HANDSETS IN MAY $AAPL
